title: unlimited craft
body:
# Want to make more stuff?

well there u go u get stuff inspired by roblox islands

## This mod adds:

-Steel

-Red Bronze

-Aquamarine

-Gilded steel

(every one of them except red bronze has armor, tools related to it)

## This mod also edits the main textures:

-Currently only diamond is fully edited but theres work on

-Iron

-and Gold.

-Oh also lapis, redstone, amethyst have reworked textures too. (item version)
